rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme logging
rules.description: Centralized tamper-evident logging for regulated data flows (anchor: GDPR Art. 32 security; DPIA-driven proportionality for EU agency workloads).

rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme encryption
rules.description: Encryption in transit and at rest for regulated identifiers; key rotation cadence explicit.

rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme access
rules.description: Role-based access with periodic recertification; break-glass documented.

rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme thirdparty
rules.description: Subprocessor inventory and DPAs / vendor risk reviews before production connectivity.

rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme segmentation
rules.description: Network segmentation between regulated and non-regulated tiers; deny-by-default east-west.

rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme dr
rules.description: Backup, restore, and RTO/RPO tested quarterly for regulated datasets.

rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme changes
rules.description: Change windows, CAB approval, and automated drift detection for production configs.

rules.controlName: EU GDPR public-sector digital service — control theme monitoring
rules.description: Security monitoring and alerting on privileged actions and data exfiltration patterns.
